description: Transform the static production Docker Compose setup for the 'Quote Service' at `/home/ga/projects/quote-service/` into a dynamic development environment. Modify the `docker-compose.yml` to enable hot-reloading by implementing a bind mount from the host's `./src` directory to `/app` in the container and overriding the command to run the Flask development server in debug mode (`--debug --host=0.0.0.0`). The service must be accessible at `http://localhost:5000` such that source code changes in `src/app.py` take effect immediately without rebuilding or restarting the container.
